title: The Snow Turns to Cherry Blossoms
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on the snow turns to cherry blossoms, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Snow Turns to Cherry Blossoms. Kureha fires Hiriluk’s final miracle into the snow, sending Chopper off beneath cherry blossoms and a new flag. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: afterwards, "Hiriluk's cherry blossoms" that fell on that fateful night,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: became known throughout the world as the voice that signaled the birth of freedom in a country yet without a name.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that this country would adopt a most unusual flag as their national symbol,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: is a story for later.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Hmm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They must've left the island by now...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The Reindeer that inherited both the best medical skills and the heart required for a doctor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If Hillulk's "Cherry Blossoms" really did cause a miracle,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Then it's the fact that a timid little Reindeer like him decided to venture the seas...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He was acting all tough like a man for a moment there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hee Hee Hee...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm sure this country will change,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just like him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dalton!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Look!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We just remembered that we ought to show you this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Show me what?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This! Look!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's him! No doubt about it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A wanted pirate,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh? Well isn't he quite the notorious villain?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee Hee...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where did you get this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Well, that's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We should've showed this to you earlier but we forgot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Around a week ago,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A lone traveller suddenly showed up in Robelle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: For some reason, it didn't snow at all that day.

summary: This part highlights the snow turns to cherry blossoms and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
